title: Arsenal Compatibility
description:
A data pack made to add compatibility for the following mods with the Arsenal Mod's weapon racks:
'Aquamirae', 'The Bumblezone', 'BetterEnd'
body: This is a datapack to add support for certain mods with equipment that is incompatible with the 'Arsenal' mod's weapon rack system. Currently, the mods I have added functionality for are 'Aquamirae', 'The Bumblezone', and 'BetterEnd'. For the screenshots, I hid the weapon racks (This is done by using "Shift + Right Click" on the weapon rack if it has something in it).
